# Repository Description

**Short Description (for GitHub About section):**
```
Your pocket compendium for Persona 3, 4, and 5 - Complete persona database, enemy compendium, fusion calculator, and 100% image coverage. Built with Kotlin & Jetpack Compose.
```

**Topics/Tags (for GitHub):**
```
persona, persona-3, persona-4, persona-5, android, kotlin, jetpack-compose, material-design, compendium, fusion-calculator, android-tv, megami-tensei, atlus, jrpg
```

**Website (optional):**
```
https://github.com/Sentovibes/persona-companion-app/releases/latest
```
